decisions.title: Prioritize Edge Stability vs Feature Velocity
decisions.context: ENG-9436 shows Edge exiting on SQL lock contention. With Sift Edge as a 2026 pillar product (Build the Moat), must decide: pause new features to harden core stability or continue parallel development?

arguments.for: Edge GUI (ENG-9883) and feature development build competitive moat; customers expect rapid iteration
arguments.against: Stability issues undermine 'Nail the Core'; crashes prevent capturing decisions (North Star); technical debt compounds

decisions.title: Canvas Pass/Fail UX Pattern for Other Products
decisions.context: ENG-9437 introduces Pass/Fail buttons to Canvas. This decision-capture mechanism directly supports North Star metric. Should this pattern become standard across Explore V2 and Python Rules?

arguments.for: Standardizes decision capture across platform; increases Decisions Per Customer metric; reinforces Signal>Evidence>Decision framework
arguments.against: Each product has different decision contexts; premature standardization may constrain product-specific innovation

decisions.title: Invest in Self-Service Analytics Infrastructure
decisions.context: Multiple initiatives (ENG-9836 Test Results KPI Dashboard, ENG-6792 Metrics Ingester, ENG-7954 Sigma stats, ENG-9902 Customizable Downsampling) signal customer need for flexible analytics. Embed Deeper pillar requires decision.
decisions.blockedBy: Unclear customer segment priority: fleet operators (CX2) vs single-asset teams; resource allocation across 5 key products

arguments.for: Analytics = more signals captured; enables Ask SIFT intelligence; addresses calculated channel issues (ENG-9151, ENG-9818)
arguments.against: Dilutes focus from core 5 products; risk of building features not decisions; may not increase North Star if unused

decisions.title: SCIM/Auth Reliability Investment Level
decisions.context: ENG-9788 shows repeated SCIM deactivation for enterprise customer (Impulse Space). Enterprise = Embed Deeper pillar. Authentication issues prevent platform access = zero decisions captured.

arguments.for: Enterprise reliability table stakes for Embed Deeper; prevents churn; enables expansion
arguments.against: One-off incident may not justify broad investment; other priorities more directly tied to North Star

timeAudit.weekSummary: Engineering alignment heavy week: multiple RFC reviews (ENG-9902, ENG-9836) and cross-functional syncs for Edge, Canvas, and fleet features consuming strategy capacity
alerts: Only 20% focus time this week - below 30% threshold for strategic thinking

No decision-making sessions scheduled despite 4 open strategic decisions
